_comment: Global pair-selection thresholds + per-source frame-gap floors. Per-skill knobs (both pose and content) live in configs/skills/<skill>.json. Calibrated against the published CrossPoint-378K distribution (chat note 2026-04-24).

selection._yaw_comment: Floor on the floor-plane yaw difference between src/tgt cameras (degrees). Filters pairs where the camera tilted up/down without enough left/right panning.

min_frame_gap_by_source._comment: Floor for |f_src - f_tgt|. ScanNet relaxed from 60 (published p1) to 40 to admit more near-baseline pairs.
